summary: Grace Community Church mobile app — full backend + frontend testing. All 11 pytest backend tests pass. All 4 tabs render, navigation works, prayer submission persists end-to-end, donation order creation works for both UPI and Razorpay, YouTube iframe embeds correctly. No critical issues found.

issues: Uses deprecated shadow* style props (shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius/shadowOffset on giveBtn) — React Native Web warns to use boxShadow. Non-blocking but should be migrated.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate deprecated shadow* props in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/give.tsx giveBtn style to boxShadow for RN Web compatibility (warning only).
When user provides real Razorpay keys, replace mocked order_id generation in /app/backend/server.py create_donation_order with real Razorpay /v1/orders API call.
When user provides Resend API key, the no-op email path in send_prayer_email will auto-activate — no code change needed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py logger is used inside send_prayer_email but defined AFTER routes (line 255). Currently works because send_prayer_email runs only after RESEND_API_KEY check at runtime, but logger reference is to module-level name resolved late — safe but fragile. Move logger setup above route definitions.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded in all responses (via doc_to_dict helper + projection {'_id': 0}). Verified in tests.
Razorpay order creation is MOCKED (generates fake order_id locally) — by design per problem statement; flagged as expected mock.
Resend email send is no-op when RESEND_API_KEY is empty — by design (MOCKED placeholder behavior).
Frontend uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (correct for Expo public env vars).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 tabs, navigation, forms, API integration verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test prayer requests (TEST_User, Test Pilgrim, Anonymous) and donation orders (TEST_Donor, TEST_Donor2, TEST_UPI, TEST_RZ) in MongoDB during pytest + UI runs. Minor cleanup recommended but not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints: GET /api/, POST /api/prayers, GET /api/prayers, POST /api/donations/create-order, POST /api/donations/confirm-upi, POST /api/donations/verify-razorpay, GET /api/donations. Frontend testIDs: home-church-name, home-church-tagline, home-daily-verse, quick-{watch,give,prayer,services}, live-player, open-youtube-btn, open-channel-btn, preset-{amt}, custom-amount-input, purpose-{name}, donor-{name,email}-input, method-{upi,razorpay}, give-now-btn, anonymous-toggle, prayer-{name,email,request}-input, category-{name}, submit-prayer-btn. Razorpay/Resend are MOCKED by design. Use page.once('dialog', lambda d: d.accept()) when clicking submit/give buttons on web (RN Alert maps to window.alert).
